description:
To properly set the owner of /var/log/cloud-init.log, run the command: 
$ sudo chown syslog /var/log/cloud-init.log
or 
$ sudo chown root /var/log/cloud-init.log
rationale:
The <tt>/var/log/cloud-init.log</tt> file contains detailed debugging information that
helps users troubleshoot cloud-init and should only be accessed by authorized personnel.
ocil_clause: /var/log/cloud-init.log does not have an owner of syslog|root
ocil:
To check the ownership of /var/log/cloud-init.log, run the command: 
$ ls -lL /var/log/cloud-init.log
If properly configured, the output should indicate the following owner: syslog|root
title: Verify User Who Owns /var/log/cloud-init.log File
